parameters.content:
## Landing Page Headline A/B Test Generator — GPT-4o-mini + Sheets + Gmail

For marketers, growth teams, and conversion specialists who want data-driven headline variants ready to A/B test in minutes. Submit your landing page URL and current headline via the form. The workflow scrapes the page, cleans the HTML, and sends the content to GPT-4o-mini which generates exactly 10 headline variations — each using a different psychological framework such as benefit-led, pain-led, curiosity, social proof, urgency, and FOMO. Every headline is scored on clarity, emotional pull, specificity, and SEO fit. Test priority is automatically assigned. All 10 headlines are logged to Google Sheets and a Gmail report groups them by test priority with specific testing tips for each.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Landing Page Headline Generator** collects the page URL, current headline, page name, conversion goal, target audience, and your name
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores Sheet ID, recipient email, sender name, and all form values
- **3. HTTP — Scrape Landing Page** fetches the raw HTML so GPT has real page context
- **4. Code — Clean Page Content** strips nav, footer, scripts, and styles — keeps 3500 chars of clean body text
- **5. AI Agent — Generate Headlines** uses GPT-4o-mini to write 10 headlines across 10 frameworks, each scored on 4 dimensions with a testing tip and priority assignment
- **8. Code — Split Headlines for Sheets** splits the array to one item per headline, marks isLastRow on headline 10, and carries the full array on the last item for Gmail
- **9. Google Sheets — Log Headline Tests** appends one row per headline — 10 rows per run
- **10. IF — All Headlines Logged?** gates the Gmail report so it fires exactly once after all 10 rows are saved
- **11. Code — Build Gmail Report** groups headlines by test priority, formats scores, and adds step-by-step testing instructions
- **12. Gmail — Send Headline Report** delivers the complete report to your inbox

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace PASTE_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE, PASTE_YOUR_EMAIL_HERE, and PASTE_YOUR_NAME_HERE
2. In **6. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **9. Google Sheets — Log Headline Tests** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
4. In **12. Gmail — Send Headline Report** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named Headline Tests with columns: Date, Page URL, Page Name, Headline #, Framework, Headline Copy, Clarity Score, Emotional Pull, Specificity, SEO Fit, Overall Score, Test Priority, Submitted By
6. Activate and open the Form URL to submit your first page

nodes.name: Section — Form Input, Config, Page Scraping, and HTML Cleaning

parameters.content:
## Form Input, Config, Page Scraping, and HTML Cleaning
User submits page URL, current headline, conversion goal, and target audience. Config stores all credentials and form values. HTTP scrapes the page HTML. A Code node strips nav, footer, scripts, and styles — leaving 3500 chars of clean body text for GPT.

## AI Headline Generation
GPT-4o-mini generates exactly 10 headlines across 10 psychological frameworks. Each headline is scored on clarity, emotional pull, specificity, and SEO fit. Test priority is auto-assigned and a specific testing tip is included per headline.

nodes.name: Section — Headline Split, Sheet Logging, and Gmail Report

parameters.content:
## Headline Split, Sheet Logging, and Gmail Report
Splits the 10 headlines to one item per row. Google Sheets logs every headline. The IF node checks isLastRow — only the 10th headline triggers the Gmail report. The report groups headlines by test priority with scores and testing tips for each.

values.placeholder: The headline currently showing on your page
Example: Homepage, Pricing Page, Free Trial Page
Example: Book a demo, Start free trial, Buy now, Get a quote
Example: SaaS founders, personal injury lawyers, medical spa owners

parameters.formDescription: Get 10 scored headline variations for your landing page — each using a different psychological framework. Ready to A/B test immediately.

parameters.text:
=You are a world-class conversion copywriter with 15 years of experience writing headlines that increase click-through rates and conversions.

You are analyzing this landing page to write 10 headline variations.

Page details:
Current headline: {{ $json.currentHeadline }}
Conversion goal: {{ $json.conversionGoal }}
Target audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
Page name: {{ $json.pageName }}

Page content:
{{ $json.pageContent }}

Write exactly 10 headline variations. Each headline must use a different psychological framework from the list below.

Return ONLY a valid JSON array of exactly 10 objects. No extra text. No markdown. No backticks.

Each object must have exactly these fields:

headlineNumber
A number from 1 to 10.

framework
The psychological framework used. Choose one different framework for each headline from this list:
Benefit-led, Pain-led, Curiosity, Social proof, Specificity and numbers, Urgency, Before and after, Question, Bold claim, Fear of missing out

headlineCopy
The actual headline text. Under 12 words. Written for the target audience. Directly connected to the conversion goal. Do NOT use the current headline.

clarityScore
A number from 1 to 10. How instantly clear is the message to a first-time visitor?

emotionalPull
A number from 1 to 10. How strongly does this headline create a feeling or desire?

specificity
A number from 1 to 10. How specific and concrete is this headline versus generic?

seoFit
A number from 1 to 10. How well does this headline include natural search-friendly language?

overallScore
The average of the four scores above rounded to one decimal place.

testPriority
Exactly one of: Test First, Test Second, Test Third, Lower Priority
Assign Test First to the 2 strongest headlines, Test Second to the next 3, Test Third to the next 3, Lower Priority to the remaining 2.

testingTip
One sentence of specific advice for testing this particular headline. Under 20 words.

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: More headlines being logged to Sheets — loop continues.
